publishedAbstract: * CephFS logging slow request while setting SELinux extended attributes on files. * The MDS logs slow request during the SELinux context setting: ~~~ [WRN] slow request 30.308475 seconds old, received at 2022-10-08 11:24:01.491429: client_request(client.898845:3819 setxattr #0x10001d1111d security.selinux 2022-10-08 11:24:01.490500 caller_uid=0, caller_gid=0{}) currently submit entry: journal_and_reply ~~~ * And `MDS_SLOW_REQUEST` like the following one is shown in MON pods: ~~~ debug 2022-10-08 11:24:36.113 7fc326c83700 0 log_channel(cluster) log [WRN]: Health check failed: 1 MDSs report slow requests (MDS_SLOW_REQUEST) ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph MDS report slow request setting SELinux extended attributes on files
